prayer.title: 🕊️ Morning Prayer
prayer.modeh_ani: מודה אני לפניך — I gratefully thank You, living and eternal King, for returning my soul within me with compassion.
prayer.blessing: Blessed are You who opens the eyes of the blind — help me see opportunities today.
prayer.psalm: **Psalm 112:5**: "Good comes to those who lend freely, who conduct their affairs with justice."
prayer.proverb: **Proverbs 24:27**: "Prepare your work outside; get everything ready, then build your house."
prayer.intention: Let today's small faithfulness lead to tomorrow's greater stewardship.
prayer.closing: May your work today be a pleasing offering. May your rest tonight be deep and restorative.

mre.title: 📊 MRE Trading
mre.thesis: Markets fearful at 35 F&G. Sideways regime with multiple sector opportunities. QQQ showing strongest signal (19.6). Tech and communication sectors leading.

relationship.title: 💕 Relationship Focus
relationship.primary_focus: PRIORITY: Focus on repair. Acknowledge recent conflicts without defending.
action_items: Increase acts of service dramatically this week
Create space for her to express frustrations without fixing
Handle the boys' bedtime routine solo tonight - give her 30 minutes to herself

headlines: McKinsey now operates 20,000 AI agents alongside 40,000 human employees
